BeforeAgent.command: sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.codex/plugins/agent-context-resolver/scripts/agent-context-resolver-hook; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'
sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.kg/codex/tools/drift-hook; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'

AfterAgent.command: sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.kg/codex/tools/drift-hook; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'

SessionStart.command: sh -c 'd=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ]; do p=$d/.kg/codex/tools/drift-hook; [ -f "$p" ] && exec sh "$p"; d=${d%/*}; done; exit 0'
